description: Letter from Hassun b. Yiṣḥaq in Alexandria to Yahya b. Ismail in Fustat. The sender inquires about a shipment of tin sent to the addressee. Hassun also announces that he is anticipating a shipment of leather for which he specifies requirements concerning the shipment, expenses and the required documents. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #808)ת On verso another text.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מאלכסנדריה לפוסטאט. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
